title: Biodiverzitás indikátorok az európai mezőgazdálkodási rendszerek értékeléséhez
subtitle: Kivonat
description: A summary of the BioBio EU FP7 project’s guidebook on farmland biodiversity indicators, presenting a set of 23 scientifically tested metrics for assessing habitat, species, genetic, and farm management diversity in European agricultural systems. It outlines the development process, field methodologies, case studies across multiple regions, and recommendations for monitoring and policy integration.
